problem: Healthcare organizations struggle to unify clinical, financial, and operational data into actionable insights, leading to inefficiencies in care delivery, missed revenue opportunities, and difficulty in improving patient outcomes.
solution: Health Catalyst provides a healthcare analytics platform that unifies data from multiple sources into a single source of truth, offers AI-assisted benchmarking and insights, and provides self-service tools with role-specific guidance to help organizations improve revenue, labor efficiency, and patient access.
